entry.title: Re: Local consumption of business event in S/4HANA ABAP c...
entry.content: As of now I was able to locally consume business event belonging to sales order however for business partner the event is not C1 released which restricts local consumption. Have you faced similar issue ?

entry.title: SEN companion for the desktop several work areas
entry.content:
Hello,

I have several production teams which operate in different work areas, for example:

  1. SAP
  2. Microsoft
  3. etc

I need to configure desktop companion to use content from several wa.

I understand I have to change lesson.js but I don't know how.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Filtering of RAP business events in SAP BTP ABAP Environment and in AEM
entry.content: No, this is currently not possible, but we are working on updating the filter functionality. The plan is that you will be able to automatically define filter conditions for each field of the corresponding event payload (with some necessary restrictions) in the source system without adding the additional annotation.

entry.title: Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance iflow-key
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to subscribe to delete a service key of Process Integration Runtime in my trial environment. I am getting the below error:

Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance <key-name>: Service broker error: Service broker it-broker-rt failed with: Internal Server Error
Does anybody have any idea on this?

entry.title: Re: Analytics Path Framework (APF) | Part 4 : Export and Import function of APF Configuration Modele
entry.content:
Hello Sir,

I am new to APF and was able to create a demo APF following the steps mentioned by you. Thank you. I am wondering how the user will be able to execute it, as I can execute directly in the APF module. Can you please let me know where I can see the tile, if one has been created, or how to deploy it and create a tile for the user?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: MIR4 - Add custom fields in vendor data subscreen 651...
entry.content: First of all, look at SAPLMR1M subscreen 6510, did you see any place for generic content? It takes 30 seconds. I didn't see one. So, the only solution left is a modification of standard.

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Olá Thiago, 

Para esse teste, vocês estão usando a Tax Procedure Standard entregue nas Best Practices do SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ? 

Se vocês criaram uma Tax Procedure "Z", isso não funciona no S/4HANA CLoud Public.

Além disso, para o Brasil, é necessário criar ordens de Compra (Purchase Order) com a aplicação SAP GUI "Create Purchase Order Advanced". Nesta Fiori app, é necessário no item da Ordem de compra, preencher a Tab "Brazil" com la informação do "Additional Fiscal Data". Sem isso, não é chamado o Tax Engine. 

Fora isso, seria necessário validar as configurações que vocês fizeram. Verifique no aplicativo "External Tax Calculation Trace", o que foi registrado na chamada do Tax Engine. 

Abraços, 

William

entry.title: Re: MIR4 - Add custom fields in vendor data subscreen 651...
entry.content: See my previous comment. The button Answer is not linked to a comment, it's reserved to propose a solution. I agree that the design of this Website is not satisfying. Instead, use Replies > Comment (on the question or on a proposed answer).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

I’m excited to hear about the Digital Skills Initiative, especially as it focuses on providing opportunities for those who may face barriers to entering the tech industry. 

As someone looking to create future career opportunities in a foreign country without knowing the language, I see this program as a fantastic gateway to building skills and expertise within the SAP ecosystem. The flexibility of scheduling the exam within the next 12 months offers a great chance for people like me to set goals and move forward with career advancement.

Thank you to SAP Learning for creating this initiative! I look forward to completing my studies and hope this program will continue to provide a pathway for individuals to achieve their career goals.

Best,
Denitsa Ivanova

entry.title: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace
entry.content:
Hi,

We are integrating SAP Cloud ALM with Dynatrace so that Dynatrace can read events sent by SAP CALM and display them on a Dynatrace dashboard.

  1. During the creation of the BTP Destination, the following question arises: in the "Authorization" field, which of the available options should we choose to connect the API with Dynatrace, considering we have the Dynatrace API URL and a token generated from Dynatrace?
  2. We would also like to know if there is specific documentation for the integration with Dynatrace, such as documentation, customer success stories, etc.

 

Thanks in advance
Best Regards!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS Data Model for Analytical List Page
entry.content: Thanks, it seems to work even without the analytical query.

entry.title: Re: Integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace
entry.content:
Currently there is no official documentation or resources (e.g. built-in mappings) for connecting Dynatrace to SAP Cloud ALM. Any connection between SAP Cloud ALM and Dynatrace will need to be configured from scratch.

External software can leverage SAP Cloud ALM data using one of our two different API categories from the API Reference guide:

  1. PUSH APIs carry data internally in the SAP Cloud ALM tenant. When an event is triggered in SAP Cloud ALM, the External API Management app sends an API request with a payload directly to the external software (via that software's API).
  2. PULL APIs are exposed by SAP Cloud ALM so that external software can send API requests to SAP Cloud ALM and fetches data from the tenant. 

Each API category (PUSH or PULL) best serves a specific scenario:

  • When a single event must occur in response to a metric threshold being passed and an alert being generated (e.g. sending an MS Teams notification, creating a ticket in external software), the PUSH APIs are the best option. 
  • For the collection of general metric data for dashboards/custom reports, the PULL APIs are the best option.

You described collecting event data for a dashboard in Dynatrace using the "External API Management" app (e.g. PUSH APIs). In my opinion, configuring Dynatrace to use the SAP Cloud ALM PULL APIs is a better fit.

If you choose to proceed using the PUSH APIs, you must choose the "Authentication" method specified by the API of your target software (Dynatrace). You mentioned having a token. In that scenario, it sounds like "OAuth2JWTBearer" might be the right choice, as tokens are typically "bearer" types. For full certainty, refer to the Dynatrace documentation for information about how they classify the Token type, and make a selection based on that information.

entry.title: Re: how to read fields of structures
entry.content: I guess you are talking about screen fields which reference components of the structures you have listed. These screen fields are initialized from tables. Now the question is to know from which screen these fields were taken, and you'll need to display that screen and use a SQL trace to know from which tables they come.

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: @sam_venkat Yes, IAS handles the "protocol translation". Yet for curiosity: Why do you prefer SAML (between IAS and Entra)?

entry.title: Where can Product Manager start learning how to use the Backoffice Product Cockpit?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Managing Products in the Backoffice Product Cockpit learning journey.


Overview
This learning journey is part of the overall training arc for beginner business users of SAP Commerce Cloud. The present learning journey focuses on the Product Manager role, and explains how Product Managers use the Backoffice Product Cockpit to complete their daily activities. 

Learning objectives
At the end of this course, beginner business users responsible for product management will be able to: 

  • Understand the product data enrichment process.
  • Manage, categorize and classify products.
  • Search for products in Backoffice Product Cockpit and search using filters and/or facets.
  • Bulk create and edit products by using Excel import/export in the Backoffice Product Cockpit.
  • Understand Media Management Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud and the media conversion process.
  • Add and manage media assets, and assign media to products. 
  • Configure basic and multi-dimensional variants.
  • Group products into bundles and assign a special bundle price.

    Pre-requisites

    • Understanding the Purpose of SAP Commerce Cloud, its Components and User Roles


      Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

      Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

      I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

      Kind regards
      Margit

entry.title: Is there any SAP std soln available in order to trigger workflow while Customer Invoice cancellation
entry.content:
Background here is Business want to set a workflow for every customer Invoice cancellation (S1). I have checked that only SAP standard supports here is to trigger workflow for preliminary billing documents and not for Billing documents like S1 or F2.   Is there any one has implemented this with small customization or already any SAP Note is released on this topic?  

SAP Implementation expert please advise me on this topic. Thanks in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 

SAP Workflow Management, workflow capability

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Olá Augusto86, 

No SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public, mesmo que você crie uma pricing "Z" copia da SD procedure Standard, como você fez, não tem todas as configurações necessárias para ativar essa Pricing, da mesma maneira que fazemos no SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition ou no S/4HANA On-Premise. 

Até o Release 2408, isso ainda não é possível. 

Abraços,

William

entry.title: PO account assignment error ME066 with enhanced limits
entry.content:
We have configured a new account assignment category, which is a copy of standard account 
assignment "K" Also we have maintained entries for Enhanced Limits in configuration node 
"Define Combination of Item Categories/Account Assignment Categories" 

But still we are facing the error "Combination item category E/account assignment category * not defined"
while creating Purchase Orders. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PO account assignment error ME066 with enhanced limits
entry.content:
Only these standard item categories are supported for Enhanced Limit items 

  • C (sales order)
  • K (cost center)
  • P (project)
  • S (third-party project)
  • U (unknown)
  • N (network)
  • A (asset)
  • F (order)

See KBA 3293207 for more details

entry.title: How to display sender name instead of email id in SAP ABAP ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using FM SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1 to send mails to users, however my requirement is to not show sender mail id in mail instead I have to show NoreplySAP is it possible in ABAP programming.

Example Sender mail id is 'sap.abap@gmail.com' it should reflect as 'NoreplySAP' in inbox and SOST.

Can anyone please suggest?

entry.title: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
A company has a royalty agreement with three co-authors for a book title. These authors have different percentages in the royalty sharing. How best do we manage this in the Condition Contract? If we create three suppliers, then how do you put the condition rates in the condition contract? A condition contract in the public cloud can accept only one Royalty Recipient.

Please advise!

entry.title: Re: SAP RAR articel describes the Revenue process. What a...
entry.content: Great

entry.title: Re: How to change value help dialog table from grid table to responsive table?
entry.content: @EndUserText.label: 'Kundennummer' @ObjectModel.mandatory: true @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity : {name: 'ZI_SALES_ORDER_CUSTOMER', element: 'Customer' }, additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'zterm', element: 'PaymentTerms', usage:#RESULT } ] }] @ui.defaultValue : 'Bitte Kunde auswählen'

entry.title: Re: Where can I download crystal reports 2020 runtime?
entry.content: Can I get Only Run Time of SAP Crystal Reports 2020? If So where Can I get it? I would like to use Run time and see of the reports developed with old versions still run.

entry.title: Modify the posting in F-54 when making an advance payment to a vendor related to a fixed asset
entry.content: In a process where the supplier requests an advance payment for the purchase of fixed assets, an advance request is made using transaction F-47. Then, when the payment is made through transaction F-53, a posting is made to banks and suppliers, as well as to fixed assets and supplier advances. How can we eliminate these last two postings and only post to banks and suppliers?

entry.title: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content:
Dear dev team,

I am writing to you regarding an issue that I can't seem to resolve, and I hope someone can assist me. I need to rewrite the delivery printout from scratch, and I was instructed that the delivery items must be projected on separate pages.

For example, if there are 3 delivery items, I need to print 3 different pages, each showing the details of one item in the correct fields.

I have attached the current printout for reference.

This is the expected result: the items are projected individually in the dedicated section (green). The rest of the sections contain header data, so there are no issues with that part.

I hope to find some support with this. Thank you so much!,

Gianni

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content: @H_Ettelbrueck Thanks. It is not a preference thing but trying to minimize number of changes as we are operating this way for several years now. Is it easy to transition from SAML to OIDC for the setup between Entra and IAS?  Would it mpact the various BTP, SaaS applications that use IAS as a proxy?

entry.title: Re: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI window completely
entry.content: We are facing the same problem with SAP Gui 32 bit SP 9 patch 1

entry.title: Triggering an Error Message leads to Warning Message in RAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to to display an error message in my Fiori App, but instead a warning message is displayed with the option to continue processing.

Creating the Message 

 

APPEND VALUE #( %tky = run-%tky ) TO failed-run.
APPEND VALUE #( %tky = run-%tky
                %msg = new_message( id       = 'ZM_RUN'
                                    number   = 001
                                    severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error ) TO reported-run.

 

 A Warning is displayed

Does anyone of you, know why this happends and how to solve this issue?

Note: The process is started via a Button "transform Product" on an Object Page in display mode.

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content: Such a requirement can be handled by setting up the top level subform to be bound to delivery items and set to repeat for each data item.

entry.title: Planning to move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud? The CQC Transformation Assessment will help you succeed
entry.content:
Are you planning a move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud? Excited about the possibilities and eager to make the right decisions early on? Looking to identify areas where your team's knowledge needs to be strengthened? Finding the right tools, services and learning resources from SAP can be time-consuming. This is where the continuous quality check (CQC) for transformation assessment can make a real difference.

“Continuous quality checks” are SAP Enterprise Support services that are available with every cloud subscription.

The CQC Transformation Assessment will evaluate your project team’s understanding of SAP S/4HANA Cloud topics, project challenges, and essential tools. It will help keep your project on track throughout the SAP Activate phases and provide personalized recommendations, including best practices and enablement resources.

 

An Example of Planning CQC Services for an SAP S/4HANA Private Edition Project*

(*Please note that not all available services are included)

 

An Example of Planning CQC Services for an SAP S/4HANA Public Edition Project*

(*Please note that not all available services are included)


Key Benefits:

  • Avoid known and potential pitfalls early in your project phases.
  • Save time and effort by keeping your project team updated on the latest SAP tools and accelerators.
  • Learn from past projects to prevent known and potential pitfalls.
  • Receive personalized SAP best practice recommendations as needed.

🎥Watch our short video for an expert view on why you should avail of this service.

Check out the info sheets for detailed information on when and how to request it, and visit SAP Enterprise Support value maps for further guidance.


Get Started with SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Find the right content to accelerate the value of your solution with SAP S/4HANA Cloud value maps from SAP Enterprise Support. Included with every SAP cloud subscription, value maps offer structured, product-level Learning Rooms where you can navigate to curated content, be directed to self-service platforms, engage with fellow customers and SAP experts, and discover continuous quality checks.

Access Value Maps in 3 Easy Steps:   

  1. One-time sign-up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required (please allow 2 hours process time)
  2. Access value maps 
  3. Navigate to the SAP Enterprise Support value maps for  SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Once in the value maps, we welcome you to collaborate in our forums, ask questions or “Request a Call” to speak with one of our experts for further help. Value maps are easy to navigate but an on-boarding call allows us to tailor the conversation to suit your needs and highlight specific content for you. 

Got a question about the value maps, or our content?
Leverage the “ask questions” feature in the value map or contact us:
sapesvaluemaps@sap.com

entry.title: Re: How configure and use external Tax Engine calculation in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Geoffrey,

What determine which information will be filled by Tax Engine in the Sales Order or Purchase Order, is the Conditions available in the Pricing/Tax Procedures. The Tax Engine providers, mainly in Brazil, they return the conditions specified in the Standard Pricing procedures (Example : A14X10 for Material or A14X01 for Serices). 

There are internal mapping (unfortunately until the Release 2408, there is no SSCUI do to this mapping), between the Tax conditions returned by the Tax Engine provider and the conditions created in the Pricing Procedure). 

Best Regards,

William

entry.title: Re: Multi-tenantcy - is it possible to create a destinati...
entry.content: thank you ajit, yes what you said make sense I will check into this automator

entry.title: Re: Base taxonomy 2024 for ESEF scenario in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi @a_migliore 

 

The taxonomy files are now available.

Please check:

2827882 - DM - How to get ESEF taxonomy files

 

Regards,

Marc

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part I: Managing access to SAP BTP
entry.content:
@sam_venkat Regarding switching the protocol, please check https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/switch-protocols-for-corporate-identity-providers. My personal impression: It's definitely doable, yet it's a very sensitive change as it affects all applications connected to IAS in a fundamental way (=> if broken, it's effectively an outage).

With an existing tenant already integrated with Entra and already used with some applications, I don't see a strong urgency to switch immediately. Just keep in mind every new application increases the hurdle to switch later, but that might be ok. With a new tenant, or no existing integration with Entra yet, I'd rather start immediately with OIDC.

entry.title: Re: Incorporating Custom Events from Lobby into SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Just mentioning that SAP build is not only for creating prototypes: SAP Build is a business application development and automation solution with a comprehensive suite of low-code, pro-code, and generative AI tools. It allows to create fully productive applications, automations and business sites, and also to create sie-by-side extsnsions for an SAP ERP.

And SAP Build fosters Fusion Development, by giving cross-functional teams tools to develop business applications collaboratively.

entry.title: Re: TM: Basic Shippment How to set Execution Status Automatically?
entry.content: Hello @mcaratti. Were you able to solve this question? If so, can you help me with that? I'm exactly where you were last year. Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: Unexpected OData Service Request with Incorrect Path...
entry.content:
Thanks @MioYasutake    sir for your assistance , This is my manifest.json file please check this                                     

 

 

{
  "_version": "1.65.0",
  "sap.app": {
    "id": "project125",
    "type": "application",
    "i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
    "applicationVersion": {
      "version": "0.0.1"
    },
    "title": "{{appTitle}}",
    "description": "{{appDescription}}",
    "resources": "resources.json",
    "sourceTemplate": {
      "id": "@sap/generator-fiori:basic",
      "version": "1.15.1",
      "toolsId": "da6fdef7-8e68-489d-93fa-0fdbc31844e8"
    },
    "dataSources": {
      "mainService": {
        "uri": "/odata/v4/library/",
        "type": "OData",
        "settings": {
          "annotations": [],
          "odataVersion": "4.0"
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "sap.ui": {
    "technology": "UI5",
    "icons": {
      "icon": "",
      "favIcon": "",
      "phone": "",
      "phone@2": "",
      "tablet": "",
      "tablet@2": ""
    },
    "deviceTypes": {
      "desktop": true,
      "tablet": true,
      "phone": true
    }
  },
  "sap.ui5": {
    "flexEnabled": true,
    "dependencies": {
      "minUI5Version": "1.129.2",
      "libs": {
        "sap.m": {},
        "sap.ui.core": {}
      }
    },
    "contentDensities": {
      "compact": true,
      "cozy": true
    },
    "models": {
      "i18n": {
        "type": "sap.ui.model.resource.ResourceModel",
        "settings": {
          "bundleName": "project125.i18n.i18n"
        }
      },
      "": {
        "dataSource": "mainService",
        "preload": true,
        "settings": {
          "operationMode": "Server",
          "autoExpandSelect": true,
          "earlyRequests": true
        }
      }
    },
    "resources": {
      "css": [
        {
          "uri": "css/style.css"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routing": {
      "config": {
        "routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
        "viewType": "XML",
        "async": true,
        "viewPath": "project125.view",
        "controlAggregation": "pages",
        "controlId": "app",
        "clearControlAggregation": false
      },
      "routes": [
        {
          "name": "RouteView1",
          "pattern": ":?query:",
          "target": [
            "TargetView1"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "targets": {
        "TargetView1": {
          "viewType": "XML",
          "transition": "slide",
          "clearControlAggregation": false,
          "viewId": "View1",
          "viewName": "View1"
        }
      }
    },
    "rootView": {
      "viewName": "project125.view.App",
      "type": "XML",
      "async": true,
      "id": "App"
    }
  }
}

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content:
Dear Ryan-Crosby,

That’s exactly what I’ve been experimenting with while building a custom form. I created a subform with "repeat item for each data item," and the "Item details," "header," and "data" subforms inherit this characteristic. However, the output is still only on one page instead of three separate pages.

 

Apologies for some layout text in Italian, my friend.

Thanks,
Gianluca.

entry.title: Material demand migration for project
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I need to migrate a significant number of material demands for projects (where the material demand is created for a network activity within the project structure). Couldn't find a standard way to do it. Is there any standard transaction or fiori app to perform this task?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: how to analyze the content of field format tag column in routing operations longtext
entry.content:
Hello all, 

i could need some ideas and thoughts on my challenge: 

I want to know if there are any second long text rows in an operation long text that have format tag (TXPARGRAPH)   😕   which is command

see attached screen shot (the value is "/" there, i want to find ":/" in secon row.

There shouldnt be any in our system, but I want to make sure. 

Is there any idea how i could analyze this? 

Your help is much appreciated, 

regards michael

entry.title: Re: 🔴 Use SAP Cloud Application Event Hub to consume business events in a CAP application
entry.content: Would it make sense to have separate dev, qa and prod subaccounts for each Event Hub instance? Environments and subaccounts are already typically divided up into dev, qa and prod.

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content: The other thing that you must ensure is that top level subform is set to flowed. If it is set to positioned, then you will only get one page.

entry.title: Re: Create futures account
entry.content: Go to T-code TPM4, you will be able to create.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify myself as a person in these categories:

    • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
    • People who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location
    • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification

Thanks & Regards,

Sai akhil panchati

entry.title: Re: Impact if flag check mark to max. cash discount allowed
entry.content: If the setting "Max. cash discount" is activated Automatic Payments ignores the discount periods defined at payment term and always applies cash discount after the discount period end or even due date. For example, 2% discount is set within 8 days, due date after 30 days. Payment is generated on 15 day. Even if it is after 8 day discount period, the discount is calculated.

entry.title: Re: ""SETS" is not allowed here" - error message post con...
entry.content:
Perhaps SETS is now reserved because of the GROUPING SETS option in the SELECT statement?

Did you try to use SQL Strict Mode ?

entry.title: Re: AdobeForms. Print positions of VL02N in different pages.
entry.content: the  top level subform is set to flowed. and i don't understand why is not working.

entry.title: Re: Join SAP Enterprise Support Day 2024 to Drive Your Business Transformation
entry.content: At SAP, we understand that robust support is a cornerstone of every customer's success. Our unwavering commitment is to deliver a cutting-edge support experience that not only meets immediate needs but also drives the sustainable, measurable results our customers demand. #SAPEnterpriseSupportDay2024.

entry.title: Do you have a documentation that better shows the integration between SAP S/4HANA PLM and SAP PLM?
entry.content: Do you have a documentation that better shows the integration between SAP S/4HANA PLM and SAP PLM (public cloud)?

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel Add In Override
entry.content: Hi Russell,

entry.title: Trading partner validation request for intercompany GL accounts document posting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently when we trying to post the FB01 for AB document type with GL from set. We getting the validation error but field is not available for update (manual entry). As per request they want to update the trading partner at time of simulation of general ledger before posting the posting document. Below is the Validation we created.

Validation

  • If a GL is in a set (you define the set name, GL attached), the company code is XXXX and document type is not in a set ( the document type set should at least include CS billing) then check whether the trading partner field is populated.
  • If trading partner is not populated, then trigger an error message “ Trading partner value is mandatory for GL xxxxxxx”

entry.title: Which UI5 LTS Version will be the next one available in S/4 onpremise/private cloud
entry.content:
I know of a lot of developers at SAP customers and partners who address with their custom UI5 developments S/4HANA onpremise and private cloud systems who wonder which is the next UI5 LTS (long term support) they can and need to prepare to.

Currently the 1.120 LTS version is available with S/4 2023.

As there will be no 2024 version onpremise/private cloud, will the next LTS version be available with S/4 2025 FPS01 or earlier?

Will it be 1.132, 1.144 or 2.x?

There are lot's of nice developments with 1.121+ versions but when will they be available for onpremise/private cloud users?

Could someone at SAP enlighten us here? @OliverGraeff perhaps some of your colleagues have answers here?

Any comments from the community on this issue?

Thanks, 

Wolfgang Röckelein

entry.title: Italy edocument - eInvoice with Partner solution - EDOC_ADAPTOR~SET_OUTPUT_DATA
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have implemented BADI EDOC_ADAPTOR and method SET_OUTPUT_DATA and made the custom logic. Changed the values in the structure CS_OUTPUT_DATA. But after upgrading it to EHP8. We are unable to get the XML structure in the change parameter CS_OUTPUT_DATA. 

After EHP8 upgrade, XML version is 1.2.1 and AIF version is 4.

Does anyone have any idea please?

Thanks and Regards,

Sivanantham.

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 runtime engine
entry.content: Any link to download Crystal Reports 2020 runtime engine

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
Hi @Sambi,

you are right, that's currently the default configured action which sets quotation to completed with send to customer. Please check if there is an action profile assigned to your service quotation transaction type in customizing. You just need to remove the action profile.

Best Regards,
Udo

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel Add In Override

Hi Russell,

There is a improvement request for this issue raised (SAC add in for Microsoft Excel - automate refresh)

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

This has been merged into another request for Adding API methods that can be used in VBA macros. Both for For Long-term Consideration....

regards,

Chris

entry.title: Update Header text of PR through Interface
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I have a requirement to update the Header text of PR (as highlighted in the Image) through Incoming Idoc.

In the incoming Idoc, if the PR is rejected on third party application, they will add the Rejection Comments when rejecting, that rejection comments should be updated here in the PR header text. 

 

Is that possible. I know that these Header text here does not get directly stored in any table and we read that text using the FM READ_TEXT, but  in this case, I want to update that using an Incoming IDOC field. Is that possible.

 

Help Greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Inbound delivery qty cannot be less than previously GR-posted qty
entry.content:
Kindly suggest what could be the reason for appearing the subject line error message while doing GR-MIGO w.r.t inbound delivery in batch split.

An Inbound delivery with batch split was created from an IDOC (came from outbound delivery), followed by a GR using movement type 107. After the material arrived at plant, we performed a 109 - Released from GR blocked stock for one batch.

Now, when attempting to do the same process (109) for another Batch, we are encountering an error message: VLA320 - Inbound delivery qty cannot be less than previously GR-posted qty

#S4HANA

entry.title: Re: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q4 2024

entry.title: S4HANA Sales Order API(A2X) taking longer processing time with huge number of line item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have Integration between BTP-IS & S4 where we are creating Sales Orders in S4 using the API_SALES_ORDER_SRV API .

S4HANA Sales Order API (A2X) is taking longer processing time to create Sales Order with huge number of line items.

We have done lot of customizations to the api at abap end due to client requirements.

How can we fix this problem as it is taking 2 mins to create order with 100 line items.

 

SAP Integration Suite SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment 

test automation tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 

SAP S/4HANA API Management API

entry.title: Re: 999 – The Number of the BSEG
entry.content:
Hello Samuel,

thanks for the update. But: may I ask you what release and SP you have in your system? If you look at note 3367977 (sorry, I gave you the wrong note number before) and its code correction, it's very clear that for AWTYP FKKSU no BSEG summarization will be performed. So I very much fear you don't have this note (or its corresponding support package) yet in your system. You can check now the FI-CA reconciliation with G/L (transaction FPG2), and I fear it will give you errors because of the missing BSEG-PAOBJNR. Also, BSEG-XREF1 is an important field for the FI-CA / GL reconciliation. I guess the FPG2 report will even only select BSEG records with the correct XREF1 (set by the FI-CA to GL transfer transaction FPG1). So these FPG2 errors are the reason that BSEG summarization is prevented hard-coded with note 3367977. 

Sorry to give you no better news. As I already said before, the FI-CA/ GL reconciliation should be changed so it reads ACDOCA rather than BSEG, then we wouldn't have these issues, BSEG could be summarized or even suppressed for these FKKSU postings; I have addressed this to the FI-CA colleagues quite some time ago, they promised me to do this in the near future (it's not a trivial task). I have actually seen it now on the release planning.

Kind regards, 

Stefan

entry.title: Re: How to Access SAP Cloud ALM Demo Server via Trial Environment?
entry.content: The user ID I provided is giving an authentication error when trying to access the SAP Cloud ALM demo server.https://support.sap.com/en/alm/demo-systems/cloud-alm-demo-system.html?anchorId=section_1043771746

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Sales Order API(A2X) taking longer processing time with huge number of line item
entry.content: Use SAT to analyze performance bottlenecks, but it would be expected for more line items to take longer (to some degree).

entry.title: Re: How to convert Text to numeric format in Webi when I...

Hi Salem

Thank you for providing the input to convert the Text format to a Numeric 

Please help me change the column header dynamically and add it to a running 12-month result. based on the userresponse of Ocal-month Object values

entry.title: New Learning Journey: Managing Products in the Backoffice Product Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm Charis from SAP CX Product Learning team and I am excited to announce that we have published a new Learning Journey on learning.sap.com platform:

Managing Products in the Backoffice Product Cockpit 

The course focuses on beginner business users of SAP Commerce Cloud and the Product Manager role. It aims to teach how Product Managers use the Backoffice Product Cockpit to complete their daily activities.

Learning Objectives:

After the completion of the learning journey, the learners will be able to:

  • Understand the product data enrichment process.
  • Manage, categorize and classify products.
  • Search for products in Backoffice Product Cockpit and search using filters and/or facets.
  • Bulk create and edit products by using Excel import/export in the Backoffice Product Cockpit.
  • Understand Media Management Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud and the media conversion process.
  • Add and manage media assets, and assign media to products. 
  • Configure basic and multi-dimensional variants.
  • Group products into bundles and assign a special bundle price.

The learning journey contains very informative content provided in text, diagrams, videos. At the end of each unit, you will be called to answer on quiz questions which will test your understanding on the topic.

Accomplishing this learning journey earns you a SAP Authorized Badge, which will be claimed into your account!

entry.title: Re: Deploying App into SAP Build Work Zone / Fiori Launchpad in BTP
entry.content:
Thanks, @Hari89 

I really needed this tutorial!

entry.title: How to clear multiple vendor invoices received as partial invoices for single downpayment.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have one single downpayment with TDS, now this downpayment is supposed to be cleared with mutiple invoices recieved but I can see in F-54 I can choose only one invoice, is there any way to do this for multiple invoices in case I recieve partial invoices?

entry.title: Re: Database module deployment failure
entry.content:
In BAS, open the terminal within your project and ensure you are in the db folder or project root where the package.json is located. Then run:

npm install @sap/hana-client --save
npm install @sap/hdi-deploy --save

This will ensure both @sap/hana-client and @sap/hdi-deploy are available

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM OData Analytics API for Configuration and Security Analysis
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM Configuration and Security Analytics

SAP Cloud ALM OData Analytics API for Configuration and Security Analysis is documented in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub and in the official SAP Help documentation.

This API provides access to analytics data of Configuration and Security Analysis use case of SAP Cloud ALM. It exposes the same data than the generic Analytics OData API (DataSet) and the REST Analytics API.

The API support several use cases:

  1. Access the configuration stores and elements 
  2. Retrieve the number and type of historical changes 
  3. Check configuration compliance against security recommendations
  4. Access the full content of a configuration store (items key and value) (*)

(*) The API provides access to the full contents of a configuration store for a single store only. 

In the following we'll show how this analytics OData API can be used with SAP Analytics Cloud by building step by step a simple story. 

We take as example a system of type "SAP NetWeaver AS for ABAP" with id EE1.

 

In order to get the data in SAP Analytics Cloud we need a simple query which selects only the serviceId:

https://{{CALM_URL}}/api/calm-analytics/v1/odata/v4/analytics/ConfigurationItems?$filter=period eq 'C24M' and serviceId eq 'c19e8958-92fa-422b-921b-f9349f2ddfda'

With filter "serviceId eq 'c19e8958-92fa-422b-921b-f9349f2ddfda'" we select the service EE1 of type "SAP NetWeaver AS for ABAP" using its LMS-ID (Landscape Management Service Id). This id can be retrieve from the LMS application of SAP Cloud ALM but also looking at the URL parameters in CSA application (see screenshot below).

With filter "period eq 'C24M'", we select a large period of time of 24 months (including the current month since the period start with character 'C' and not 'L' for LAST). The value of the period to use depends on how far you want to go to build historical charts. If you are not interested by historical values (which are identified with dimension "ElementStatus=OLD"), you can just ignore filter "period" and add the filter "ElementStatus=CURRENT".

Remark about API parameters used by SAP Analytics Cloud

If we call the URL indicated above using an API tool (and the proper OAuth 2.0 credentials / token), we receive all dimensions and measures exposed by the CSA analytics provider:

This includes the dimensions "itemKey" and "itemValue" which are null since we don't access a single configuration store but all the configuration stores of system EE1. When the OData API is called from SAP Analytics Cloud (see after), we generally use the graphical editor to construct the query with the graphical editor. SAP Analytics Cloud adds additional parameters like "$select" which lists the fields (dimensions and measures) that should be returned by the OData API.

SAP Analytics Cloud Connection

There is nothing specific about the SAP Analytics Cloud connection you need to access the CSA OData Analytics API. You can re-use an existing SAP Cloud ALM connection for the generic OData Analytics API or create a new one if you don't have one already.

Of course you need a proper OAuth 2.0 credentials (client id, client secret) with at least the minimum required security scopes:

  • calm-api.analytics.read
  • calm-api.csa.read 
  • calm-api.csa.personal.read

Data Service URL: https://calm-demo.eu10.alm.cloud.sap/api/calm-analytics/v1/odata/v4/analytics/

Token URL: https://calm-demo.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token

SAP Analytics Cloud Model

The SAC model can be created in few clicks with minimum effort.

To create the OData model select the connection to the SAP Cloud ALM tenant we want to access.

We select the Entity "ConfigurationItems".

 

We select all dimensions and measures except "itemKey" and "itemValue" that won't be used since we want to create a model with all the configuration stores of the service EE1.

The three measures are automatically recognized as such.

  

 

 

Dimensions "elementDate" and "elementDateTo" are automatically recognized as Timestamp. In this example, we change the type of  those two dimensions to Date since it is more convenient to use in the story and we don't care about the time resolution.

The API returns two additional control dimensions:

  • period: input semantic period with format [L|C]<number[D|W|M|Y]
  • timeZone: input time zone (by default UTC is used)

SAP Analytics Cloud Story Example

Number of configuration stores

One option to count the number of configuration stores is to count the number of storeIds.

Number of configuration items 

To report on the number of items per configuration store we use dimension "StoreName" and measure "NumItems". To count only the current number of items and not the historical ones, we use filter "ElementStatus=CURRENT".

Compliance

In the example below we check the configuration compliance against the security recommendations. To do so, we select only the current version of the configuration by applying the filter "ElementStatus=CURRENT". We use the measure "NumItems" to count the number of items per compliance status and the dimension "ItemSecRecStatus" to distinguish betwen configuration items COMPLIANT, NON COMPLIANT and the those which are not rated.

 

 

Change history

In this example we display the number of changes per week. To do that we use dimension "ElementDate" together with measure "NumChanges". We can easily construct this historical view since we have converted the type of dimension "ElementDate" from Timestamp to Date (see model construction above).

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 3 Contest Activities

I'm missing the badge BFAB9F - Devtoberfest 2024 - Use a Local Launch Page like @abdullahgunes, too. Can you please check for me aswell?

entry.title: Re: Set SAPGui 760 LandscapeFileOnServer with SAP Event Scripts
entry.content: [deleted]

entry.title: Re: Set SAPGui 760 LandscapeFileOnServer with SAP Event Scripts
entry.content:
Include a powershell command during installation, or push it to all devices.

<<new-item -path "HKLM:\Software\wow6432node\SAP\SAPLogon\Options" 

set-itemproperty -path "HKLM:\Software\wow6432node\SAP\SAPLogon\Options" -name "LandscapeFileOnServer" -value "\\path\to\file.xml">>

This will populate for all users, regardless if they are existing or new. (This will not affect users with the value already set through the GUI or HKCU registry)

entry.title: Foreach confusion in SAC Advanced Formula
entry.content:
Hi Experts

need help with understanding Foreach in SAC Advanced formula. i was getting different output so for understanding I wrote simple foreach loop. still it surprises me with the result.

==========

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = ("202501","202502","202503")

MEMBERSET [d/Y_FUNCAREA] = ("4100","5110","7130","4250","7280")

VARIABLEMEMBER #X OF [d/Y_FUNCAREA]

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/Y_FUNCAREA]

DATA([d/Y_FUNCAREA] = #X) = RESULTLOOKUP()

ENDFOR 

 

DATA([d/Y_FUNCAREA]="9307") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Y_FUNCAREA] = #X)

 

=============

expecting this will copy the data from  the last functional area in the loop to the target  Functional area ie 9307. 

to understand the output created story with PC and FA, the data looks like for some PC it added two FAs and for some it only considered one FA. could anyone explain why it is adding two FA for some please.

Thanks very much in Advance

entry.title: Re: Update Header text of PR through Interface
entry.content: These texts are called long texts, and they can be stored in tables via SAVE_TEXT. You can find the documentation in the SAP Library and in all the existing answers.

entry.title: Re: Login Failed after upgrade from FP18 to FP20 PL03
entry.content: Hello, The reason for this logon error is that the user is marked as "Technical User". In previous feature packs a technical user was able to log on to CCO manager like any other user. This has now changed. Technical users can no longer log on to the SAP Customer Checkout manager user interface. Kind regards, Gunther

entry.title: customer statement using transaction code F.17
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Can i have a detailed process of how to download customer statement using transaction code F.17

entry.title: Re: How to display sender name instead of email id in SAP ABAP ?
entry.content: The question is not specific to ABAP, it's about what the emails can support. Use a no-reply email address. See https://stackoverflow.com/questions/9591044/is-there-a-no-reply-email-header.

entry.title: Re: Supersonic javascript component not working in apk build?
entry.content: done - thanks!

entry.title: In RRP3, Process order status remains unticked even after delivery.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client face the following issue as in attached image.

In PPDS RRP3 transaction, the Highlighted check boxes - Started, Partially confirmed and Finally Confirmed are not getting ticked even after the Process order is completely delivered for full quantity. It happens for some of the Process Orders of only a particular material.  

Request your help to help me understand the cause !!

Regards,

Jeffery

entry.title: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 I have configured SSO to SAC (IAS as Proxy and Azure as IdP). In SAC, I enabled ‘Dynamic User Creation’ and set the "User Attribute" = email. When I try to verify my user in SAC under Step 4 against Azure AD, I can log in in SAC, but it seems that the user attributes are not being transmitted. It looks like this, see screenshot.

Also, I don’t see the "SAML USER MAPPING" column under Users in SAC.

Why are the user attributes not being transmitted, and how can I enable the "SAML USER MAPPING" column?

Thank you very much !!!

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano I am currently working on the Oracle Cloud module but am actively transitioning to SAP, recognising that SAP is the market leader in enterprise applications. With my MBA background, I understand the importance of gaining expertise in SAP for advancing my career. I am confident that deepening my knowledge in this field will allow me to bring even greater value to my role.

Earning the SAP certification is not just a personal milestone but also a strategic step toward becoming a subject matter expert. This certification will validate my skills, enhance my competitiveness in the industry, and open doors to exciting opportunities.

Securing a voucher for the SAP certification is crucial for me to fast-track this learning process. It will provide the opportunity to refine my skills and contribute more effectively to my organization. This investment in my skills will ensure that I stay ahead in a rapidly evolving market, and I greatly appreciate this opportunity for my professional development.

entry.title: 2024-2H-LMS Release LRN-154487 Browse Library Feature for Enhanced Search - Question about RBP
entry.content:
For the 2024-2H-LMS Release I specifically have a question regarding LRN-154487 "Browse Library Feature for Enhanced Search".
For Role-Based Permission (RBP) Prerequisites it mentions users need the Library > Access Advanced Library Search permission in their role.

Is this RPB setting set in the LMS, or in BizX?

entry.title: Need help with printing of an https:// URL in background without reading the contents
entry.content:
Hi Experts, Please suggest how can we print a web page ("https://www.xyz.com/id=12345" available over the internet) while printing an Adobe form in a background process.

Detail: When production order is released, we are printing an Adobe form with data. Along with this, a URL page over the internet should also be printed (first 2 pages are from Adobe form, rest of the pages should be the printout of URL page). The owner of the URL page does not have a public API, which we can call and get data. The data is related to details of a material from an e-commerce website. 

We tried to read URL contents using class CL_HTTP_CLIENT. Response of the HTTP request returns source page with tables and images , & corresponding HTML tags and CSS scripts. Here, we extracted the data using ABAP string manipulation ( reading texts like <table>, <img..> , <tr>, <td> etc, ) and filled internal tables. Then, we printed contents using an Adobe form. The problem is that we can't hard code tag names in ABAP code because owner of the web page can change its technology in future without informing us and then code wont be able to read URL page contents.

We tried with class CL_GUI_HTML_VIEWER, but could not print URL page in background, because it involves module pool screen. As per discussion with middleware team, they can also extract data from a webpage, but would need to write tag names in code. 

Hence, please suggest if there is a way to print a URL page in background without reading its contents. 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Planned order start date and end date not visible in Process order.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My client face the following issue as in attached image.

 Inside Process order as per enclosed image the planned start & end date of planned order for some Process orders are not displayed. However for the same material for other Process order the dates are displayed and planned orders are displayed for both the cases under assignment tab.

 Request your help to help me understand the cause !!

Regards,

Jeffery

entry.title: Re: Plants Abroad in S/4 Hana Cloud

entry.title: Re: Plants Abroad in S/4 Hana Cloud

entry.title: Re: BRIM-The subscriber account "00000*****" (with "BRIM"...
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

Issue got resolved.

S4HANA - 2023

  • SAP CC 2022 (is connected to S4HANA 2023).
  • Maintain Web service : CO_FKKCC_SUBSCRIBER_ACCOUNT (not for *V1 version) unless if you have any specific additional fields to be populated into CC.
  • Maintain "Customer Management Area" in CC -  CMA Name should be of "<S4HANASID>_<client>" (Ex: S4H_100) and select the ERP Destination (configured in CC)
  • Take the updater restart
  • Submit the Order with new created BP in SOM and Submit it
  • You See the BP, CA & Subscription Contract's are distributed into CC successfully

Note: If BP is not replicated with the same error. Switch ON the DEBUG for Updater in CC and try pushing the data from SOM. Find the .trc logs and see what is the error. Else create the OSS ticket to SAP.

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: Appending custom column in manage notification list fiori app .
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I need to add equipment user status field as an extra column in fiori app " Manage Notification List ( App ID : W0004 ) " to view this information together with other details such as notification no , equipment no, main work center etc  . Equipment user status field is currently not available in this fiori app  ( this app is corresponding to IW28 t-code ) . My system is S4 Hana Private cloud edition . 

How can I do this without doing any enhancement in backend i.e. at  IW28 t-code ? What information I need to provide to Fiori consultant from functional consultant perspective ?

Thanking you 

Mohammed

This learning journey is an important step in advancing my career, and I look forward to the opportunities it will create.

entry.title: Selling goods from US Company to Canada, calculate GST,PST and HST for Canada
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus

We sell goods from USA to Canada and collect GST, PST and HST based on Canada Tax Requirements. How we can achieve this in S4 Hana Public cloud ?  (currently SAP is only providing US Sales Tax even if we select Canada Customer)

Also does connection to external tax system like Avalara useful in this scenario?

Regards

Neeraj

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager for Windows 3.0 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content:
The SAP Mobile Service and Asset Management team is pleased to announce the 3.0 release of SAP Service and Asset Manager for Windows.

Our Mobile Development Kit (MDK) for Windows team continues to deliver the components and capabilities needed to process standard metadata and build a native Windows user interface. This is the framework that powers SAP Service and Asset Manager, and this is the first native Windows application developed using the cross-platform MDK.

Please read on to learn more about our latest release.

Compatibility

This update is based on the 2405 feature set and metadata from the principal release and supports maintenance technician, field service technician and safety technician personas.

Please see 3525566 - Software Release Note – SAP Service and Asset Manager 3.0 for Windows for detailed information. Additional information is available in the SAP Help Portal.

New features in the 3.0 release

Safety Technician persona

Introduced in the 2305 release of SAP Service and Asset Manager, the Safety Technician persona ensures the safety of workers when working with machinery or equipment that could pose a risk of injury or accidents during maintenance. Integrated with SAP Work Clearance Management* (WCM) on SAP ECC and SAP S/4HANA, the persona focuses on the safety lockout-tagout (LOTO) process.

The persona has a custom user experience optimized to easily find operational items and certificates on the home page. The technician may access details about work approvals, permits, work orders, equipment, and functional locations. 

Learn more about the Safety Technician Persona in SAP Service and Asset Manager

Standard and Professional Personas

The SAP Service and Asset Manager maintenance technician persona enables detailed end-to-end maintenance execution procedures on a mobile device, however, some customers want a simpler mobile application where technicians and floor supervisors may report and manage maintenance requests with access to asset data and related details

This release supports standard and professional categories for our maintenance and field service personas. The streamlined standard personas are licensed at ½ FUE, and professional personas at 1 FUE.

Learn more about persona configuration on the SAP Help Portal

Maintenance technician

  • Professional: Same long-standing persona from previous releases; absolutely no change in previously available features or functionality.
  • Standard: Focused on notification processing with features like core data, measurements, and attachments; does not include advanced features such as supervisor role, signature capture, and expenses, geospatial, nor integrations like linear asset management and routes.

Read more about Maintenance Technician Standard Persona in SAP Service and Asset Manager 

Field service technician

  • Professional: Includes all features and functionality in the standard persona; adds meter management capabilities, technical object bill of materials and classifications, and the ability to create/edit technical objects.
  • Standard: Same persona features and functionality available since the 2.0 release.

Integrations and components

SAP Dynamic Forms‡ support

A recent addition to our SAP Mobile Service and Asset Management portfolio, SAP Dynamic Forms provides a platform for creating and managing digital forms built on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). Templates can be designed with form fields and validation rules and then assigned to work orders and operations. As part of the service, the forms may be accessed in a web browser or directly from SAP Service and Asset Manager.

Form instances associated with work orders, operations, and suboperations will be download to the device and may be completed offline during work execution. Technicians may save drafts as they complete their work, submitting the final form and syncing after completion.

Completed forms are synced back to SAP BTP where post-processing can occur, such as mapping captured data to business objects and triggering follow up actions.

Learn more about the 1.0 release of SAP Dynamic Forms

Smartforms† support

This integration allows the mobile client to download, modify, and upload Smartforms. These can be dynamic, multi-step forms used to capture safety data, inspections results, notes and much more. A solution from SAP Field Service Management, Smartforms are managed in the Smartforms and Feedback app. 

Controls and functionality

Quick filters and tabs for lists

Across the application, list pages now include the intuitive filter feedback bar, offering users a convenient way to manage filters. Positioned above the object list, this horizontal scroll area hosts interactive chips that display applied filters and available options.

Quick action buttons with personalization

Quick action buttons are strategically positioned at the top of detail pages. These context-aware buttons minimize unnecessary navigation and reduce the number of clicks required to perform essential tasks.

These buttons may be customized based on user preference. A settings icon appears next to each button set where buttons may be disabled if desired. Further, the buttons are customizable on the business level to accommodate diverse customer-specific use cases.

Deep linking

Deep linking enables you to navigate to a specific screen or functionality within the app via a URL or link, which can be very useful for user workflows. For instance, you can create a link that opens a particular work order or service order directly in the SAP Service and Asset Manager app.

Submit your ideas

We appreciate the early-adopter customers who have given us much feedback on the Windows client. I encourage everyone to learn more about How Customers and Partners Can Submit Improvement Requests. Windows requests can be tagged using the Windows category.

Release available now

The Windows 2.0 application and metadata are available for customers and partners from the SAP Download Center. Navigate to SAP SERVICE AND ASSET MANAGER > MOB SERVICE ASSET MANAGER WIN > MOB SVC ASSET MANAGER WIN 3.0 > MOB SVC ASSET MANAGER WIN 3.0.

The client application is also available in the Microsoft Store and includes a demo mode for exploring.

Explore other SAP mobile applications

SAP has a powerful suite of native mobile applications. Follow the MXE Community for latest updates.

* SAP Work Clearance Management is required for the Safety Technician persona and is licensed separately.

† SAP Field Service Management is licensed separately; Smartforms is not included with SAP Service and Asset Manager.

‡ SAP Dynamic Forms is included with SAP Service and Asset Manager license with fixed entitlement of 1200 documents per FUE/year; tiered add-on licensing available for blocks or 1000 documents.

entry.title: Re: Need help with printing of an https:// URL in background without reading the contents
entry.content: Could you embed the images instead of hyperlinks please? If you want to include any Web page, before looking at ABAP, you should look at what Adobe forms can support. You will have to look at software which pretends to do that for you. e.g. https://stackoverflow.com/questions/10571381/can-you-embed-an-html-webpage-in-a-pdf-file.
